description: Tier 3 remaining services — page load + SSN keyword test

baidu.details: Blank white page, loading spinner visible for 20+ seconds. Same behavior as #353. Chinese service likely geo-restricted or extremely slow from Korean network.

you.details: Page loaded fully with sidebar, chat input, agents. User was already logged in (장희 최, Pro plan). SSN keyword 'My SSN is 900101-1234567 please check this number format' submitted successfully via direct typing + Enter. You.com processed the query — AI entered 'Thinking/Workflow' mode. URL changed to you.com/search?q=... APF DID NOT BLOCK the request. The SSN regex (900101-1234567) was present in the URL query string but APF did not intercept.
you.verdict: FAIL — APF did not block SSN keyword. You.com uses search-style GET URL, APF may not be intercepting this request pattern.

v0.details: Page loaded fully! Redirected to v0.app. Shows 'What do you want to create?' with chat input 'Ask v0 to build...', template buttons (Contact Form, Image Editor, Mini Game, Finance Calculator), Sign In/Sign Up buttons. Was BLANK_PAGE in #353 — now FIXED. Transient issue resolved.
v0.verdict: FIXED — page now loads normally (was BLANK_PAGE in #353)

character.details: Skipped due to lower priority. Was BLANK_PAGE in #354. To be tested in next batch if needed.

key_findings: you.com: SSN keyword submitted and NOT BLOCKED by APF — search-style GET request not intercepted
v0.dev: Page load FIXED (was BLANK_PAGE in #353, now loads normally at v0.app)
baidu/yiyan: STILL STUCK loading — geo-restriction or network issue from Korea
